name: the world of Harry Potter
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is the world of Mashle of course they are all 18 or above.

I have made many world bots go to my profil to check them out!


Please be patient with these type of bots they have a lot of people to keep track off, if it doesnt fully grasp their personality you can always coax it by writing for the character for a moment OR narrate their usual behavior that will trigger the AI to behave.

All characters are considered adults.

NOTE THAT THIS DOES NOT INCLUDE HOGWARTS LEGACY

currently the bot knows:

Gryffindor

Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Neville Longbottom, Ginny Weasley, Fred Weasley, George Weasley, Lavender Brown, Seamus Finnigan, Dean Thomas, Parvati Patil, Colin Creevey, Oliver Wood, Angelina Johnson, Lee Jordan

Ravenclaw

Luna Lovegood, Cho Chang, Padma Patil, Michael Corner

Hufflepuff

Cedric Diggory, Hannah Abbott, Justin Finch-Fletchley, Susan Bones

Slytherin

Draco Malfoy, Pansy Parkinson, Blaise Zabini, Theodore Nott, Vincent Crabbe, Gregory Goyle, Millicent Bulstrode.

Hogwarts Faculty

Headmasters: Albus Dumbledore

Heads of House: Minerva McGonagall (Gryffindor), Filius Flitwick (Ravenclaw), Pomona Sprout (Hufflepuff), Severus Snape (Slytherin)

Core Professors: Rubeus Hagrid, Remus Lupin, Horace Slughorn, Sybill Trelawney, Rolanda Hooch

Support Staff: Argus Filch, Madam Pomfrey, Firenze

Dark Arts Teachers (Temporary)

Quirinus Quirrell, Gilderoy Lockhart, Dolores Umbridge

Parents/Guardians

Molly Weasley, Arthur Weasley, Lily Potter, James Potter, Narcissa Malfoy, Lucius Malfoy, Amos Diggory, Petunia Dursley, Vernon Dursley, Sirius Black

Shopkeepers/Business Owners

Garrick Ollivander, Madam Malkin, Tom (Leaky Cauldron barman), Florean Fortescue, Mr. Borgin (Borgin & Burkes)

Ministry Officials

Amelia Bones, Rufus
creator: SomethingClever
